message:
fix(engine): harden hash stability, proof signing, parser correctness, and accessor semantics

Hash stability (signature_drift_gate, semantic_flattening_inventory):
- Add length-prefixed encoding throughout hash computations to prevent
  collision attacks where concatenated fields could be ambiguously split
- Include regime string and epoch in signature snapshot content hashes
- Prefix all variable-length fields (claim_id, verdict, reasons, specimen
  ids) with their byte length before hashing

Proof signing (proof_ingestion):
- Replace manual key||payload concatenation with AuthenticityHash::compute_keyed
  to match the compute_signature path and prevent length-extension issues
- Exclude signing_key from JSON serialization to prevent key leakage;
  update round-trip test to verify field-by-field instead of full equality

Parser hardening (parser):
- Fix find_top_level_eq to skip compound assignment operators (!=, <=, >=,
  +=, -=, *=, /=, %=, &=, |=, ^=, ~=) which were incorrectly matched as
  plain assignment
- Move rest-element validation in object binding patterns to parse-time
  (early exit on trailing elements after rest) instead of post-parse scan,
  catching "no trailing commas" violations immediately
- Tighten array binding pattern rest check to require rest at absolute last
  position (no trailing holes allowed)

Lowering pipeline (lowering_pipeline):
- Fix catch handler stack balance: pop the exception pushed by EnterCatch
  even when no binding is declared
- Parameterize diagnostic_code and site_id in unsupported_frontier_expression_error
  instead of hardcoding optional-chaining values for all call sites
- Collapse multi-line value_stack.pop().unwrap_or(0) chains to single-line
  form throughout lower_ir2_to_ir3

Object model (object_model):
- Return TypeError for accessor set operations on any object in the
  prototype chain (previously only intercepted on the receiver); the
  interpreter must handle accessor invocation
- Update test to use define_property for shadowing inherited accessors

Module ordering (lib.rs):
- Fix alphabetical ordering of cache_oblivious_metadata_substrate vs
  calibration_sentinel module declarations

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
